
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Fire Snake|kanji=дЄБеЈ≥|romaji=hinoto mi|onyomi=teishi|p=dƒЂs√ђ|w=ting-ssu|mi=t ∞i≈ЛвБµ¬≥ s…®|y=deng1 si6|j=deng1 si6|ci=t…Ы≈Л siЋР|mc=t√¶≈Л si|oc-bs=t√¶≈Л si|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yin Fire Snake also known as дЄБеЈ≥''' (hinotomi, teika no mi, teishi) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 54th combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|еЕ≠еНБеє≤жФѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to еє≤жФѓ|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Bingchen|ja|1=Yang Fire Dragon|2=ja|дЄЩиЊ∞|1=Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bingchen|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Fire Dragon|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Wugo|ja|1=Yang Earth Horse|2=ja|жИКеНИ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wugo|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Earth Horse|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the framework of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|йЩ∞йЩљдЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Tei|ja|дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|lt=Hinoto (дЄБ)|2=ja|3=дЄБ|4=zh|5=дЄБ|1=Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tei|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoto (дЄБ)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Snake|ja|еЈ≥|1=Snake (Zodiac)|lt=Snake (еЈ≥)|2=ja|3=еЈ≥|1=Snake (zodiac)|lt=Snake (еЈ≥)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake|13=User:Immanuelle/Snake (Zodiac)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|Fire|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire|13=User:Immanuelle/Fire (wuxing)|ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, forming a harmonious relationship ({{ill|Hiwa|ja|жѓФеТМ|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#жѓФеТМпЉИгБ≤гВПпЉЙ|1=жѓФеТМ|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (жѓФеТМ)|2=ja|3=дЇФи°МжАЭжГ≥#жѓФеТМпЉИгБ≤гВПпЉЙ|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=ќЯѕЕ ќ£ќєќљ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (жѓФеТМ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hiwa|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (жѓФеТМ)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Fire Snake (дЄБеЈ≥)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): dƒЂngs√ђ
** Cantonese (Jyutping): ding1 si6
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Hinoto-mi
***Kunyomi 2: Teika-no-mi
***Onyomi 1: teiji
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): jeongsa (м†ХмВђ)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): ƒРinh Tбїµ

==Years of Yin Fire Snake==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 57 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|дЄБеЈ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Fire Snake (дЄБеЈ≥)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 57|en|AD 57|qid=Q30969|lt=57 AD|1=AD 57}}
* {{ill|AD 117|en|AD 117|qid=Q24444|lt=117 AD|1=AD 117}}
* {{ill|177|en|177|qid=Q33193|lt=177 AD|1=177}}
* {{ill|237|en|237|qid=Q30750|lt=237 AD|1=237}}
* {{ill|297|en|297|qid=Q33553|lt=297 AD|1=297}}
* {{ill|357|en|357|qid=Q33897|lt=357 AD|1=357}}
* {{ill|417|en|417|qid=Q32695|lt=417 AD|1=417}}
* {{ill|477|en|477|qid=Q24851|lt=477 AD|1=477}}
* {{ill|537|en|537|qid=Q31014|lt=537 AD|1=537}}
* {{ill|597|en|597|qid=Q31459|lt=597 AD|1=597}}
* {{ill|657|en|657|qid=Q31090|lt=657 AD|1=657}}
* {{ill|717|en|717|qid=Q23532|lt=717 AD|1=717}}
* {{ill|AD 777|en|AD 777|qid=Q30714|lt=777 AD|1=AD 777}}
* {{ill|837|en|837|qid=Q25093|lt=837 AD|1=837}}
* {{ill|897|en|897|qid=Q30468|lt=897 AD|1=897}}
* {{ill|957|en|957|qid=Q23711|lt=957 AD|1=957}}
|
* {{ill|1017|en|1017|qid=Q19249|lt=1017 AD|1=1017}}
* {{ill|1077|en|1077|qid=Q19441|lt=1077 AD|1=1077}}
* {{ill|1137|en|1137|qid=Q19602|lt=1137 AD|1=1137}}
* {{ill|1197|en|1197|qid=Q19749|lt=1197 AD|1=1197}}
* {{ill|1257|en|1257|qid=Q5504|lt=1257 AD|1=1257}}
* {{ill|1317|en|1317|qid=Q5745|lt=1317 AD|1=1317}}
* {{ill|1377|en|1377|qid=Q6289|lt=1377 AD|1=1377}}
* {{ill|1437|en|1437|qid=Q6374|lt=1437 AD|1=1437}}
* {{ill|1497|en|1497|qid=Q6702|lt=1497 AD|1=1497}}
* {{ill|1557|en|1557|qid=Q6595|lt=1557 AD|1=1557}}
* {{ill|1617|en|1617|qid=Q6798|lt=1617 AD|1=1617}}
* {{ill|1677|en|1677|qid=Q7631|lt=1677 AD|1=1677}}
* {{ill|1737|en|1737|qid=Q6993|lt=1737 AD|1=1737}}
* {{ill|1797|en|1797|qid=Q7820|lt=1797 AD|1=1797}}
* {{ill|1857|en|1857|qid=Q7680|lt=1857 AD|1=1857}}
* {{ill|1917|en|1917|qid=Q2092|lt=1917 AD|1=1917}}
* {{ill|1977|en|1977|qid=Q2481|lt=1977 AD|1=1977}}
|
* {{ill|2037 AD|ja|2037еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2037|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2037 AD|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2097 AD|ja|2097еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2097|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2097 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 2090еєідї£|comment=enwiki is a redirect|1=2090s|qid=Q845811}}
* {{ill|2157 AD|ja|2157еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2157|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2157 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 22дЄЦзіА|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2217 AD|ja|2217еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2217|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2217 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23дЄЦзіА|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2277 AD|ja|2277еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2277|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2277 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 23дЄЦзіА|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2337 AD|ja|2337еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2337|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2337 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2397 AD|ja|2397еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2397|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2397 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2457 AD|ja|2457еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2457|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2457 AD|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 25дЄЦзіА|1=25th century|qid=Q49839}}
* {{ill|2517 AD|ja|2517еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2517|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2517 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2577 AD|ja|2577еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2577|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2577 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2637 AD|ja|2637еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2637|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2637 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2697 AD|ja|2697еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2697|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2697 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2757 AD|ja|2757еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2757|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2757 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2817 AD|ja|2817еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2817|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2817 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2877 AD|ja|2877еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2877|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2877 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2937 AD|ja|2937еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2937|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2937 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2997 AD|ja|2997еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2997|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2997 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yin Fire Snake==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 3 or 8 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Gui|ja|зЩЄ|1=Mizunoto (зЩЄ)|lt=Mizunoto (зЩЄ)|2=ja|3=зЩЄ|4=zh|5=зЩЄ|1=Mizunoto (зЩЄ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (зЩЄ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (зЩЄ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bo|ja|жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|lt=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|2=ja|3=жИК|4=zh|5=жИК|1=Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bo|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (жИК)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|April|en|April|qid=Q118|lt=April|1=April}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|дЄБеЈ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|жЧІжЪ¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Lixia|en|Lixia|qid=Q1191007|lt=Lixia|1=Lixia}} until the day before {{ill|Mangzhong|en|Mangzhong|qid=Q1147880|lt=Mangzhong|1=Mangzhong}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yin Fire Snake==
=== йБЄжЧ• ===
The selected day for {{ill|Teishi|ja|1=Yin Fire Snake|2=ja|дЄБеЈ≥|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Teishi|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Fire Snake|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 4th day of {{ill|Hassen|ja|еЕЂе∞В|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} (excluding gap days).

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Fire Snake|qq=ja|дЄБеЈ≥|version=84123850|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q905311|af|Vuurslang (astrologie)|cdo|Dƒ≠ng-s√™ћ§бє≥|de|Feuer-Schlange|hak|T√™n-sбє≥|ja|дЄБеЈ≥|ko|м†ХмВђ (к∞ДмІА)|vi|ƒРinh Tбїµ|za|Dingceih|zh-min-nan|Teng-s≈Ђ|zh-yue|дЄБеЈ≥|zh|дЄБеЈ≥|zh-min-nan|Sin-ch√°|zh-yue|иЊЫйЕЙ|cdo|Sin-cбє≥ћДde|nds|Holt-Hahnvi|de|Yin Fire Snake|fr|Serpent de feu|af|Houthaan (astrologie)|de|Holz-Hahneen|en|Wood Rooster|fr|Coq de boisboishak|it|Sin-chбє≥ћБid|ko|мЛ†мЬ†|vi|бЇ§t DбЇ≠u|za|Sincceij|zh|иЊЫйЕЙ|ar|Yin Fire Snake}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
